messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
PA request for a shoulder MRI for member NH-611204 with suspected rotator cuff tear after a fall. Attached: orthopedic physician order, eight weeks of documented physical therapy notes, positive impingement signs on exam.
